basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhubaneswar Laboratory Technician-III Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhubaneswar (AIIMS Bhubaneswar) Laboratory Technician-III Notification 2026 has been released on 21-05-2026 on the official website of AIIMS Bhubaneswar. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the AIIMS Bhubaneswar Laboratory Technician-III Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 30 years Age relaxation for SC, ST and OBC candidates will be given against reserved posts only. Age relaxation is admissible in respect of SC/ST/OBC candidates, Retrenched Government Employees, Departmental candidates (including projects), and Ex-servicemen in accordance with the instructions issued by the Central Government from time to time. Age concession to the extent of service rendered in other research projects will also be admissible for experience and skilled persons.

qualification.education_qualification: B. Sc. Medical laboratory Technology / Class 12th pass in Science subjects with two years' diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology, Hands on experience in pathology and biochemistry with processing of clinical specimens and Molecular technique. Proficient to read, write and speak in Hindi and English
qualification.details: B. Sc. Medical laboratory Technology OR Class 12th pass in Science subjects with two years' diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology. Hands-on experience in pathology and biochemistry with processing of clinical specimens and Molecular technique. Proficient to read, write and speak in Hindi and English.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Laboratory Technician-III.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Laboratory Technician-III post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this job?
faq.answer: The application mode for this job is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to submit the application via email?
faq.answer: The last date for email submission of the application is 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q5. When is the Walk-In Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-In Interview is scheduled for 10 June 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for the Laboratory Technician-III post?
faq.answer: The required educational qualification is B. Sc. Medical laboratory Technology or Class 12th pass in Science with a two-year diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology.

faq.question: Q7. What is the maximum age limit for this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for this post is 30 years.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary offered for the Laboratory Technician-III position?
faq.answer: The salary offered is Rs. 20000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates need to carry original documents and self-attested photocopies, including ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates if applicable.
